design_philosophy: A clean, highly functional, and professional dashboard. The design leverages warm earthy tones (cream, beige, tan) against a commanding, trust-inspiring Navy. It focuses on clarity, easy tracking, and quick interactions for gig drivers managing multiple applications and streams of income.

typography.heading_strategy: Functional, clean, and tight spacing. Strong contrast against background.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Desktop-first minimum 1280px. Fixed left sidebar navigation, main content area, right panel for detail cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1e2d5a] text-white hover:bg-[#162244] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1e2d5a] border border-[#1e2d5a] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#2563b8] text-white hover:bg-[#1d4ed8] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm

inputs.base: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2563b8] focus:border-transparent bg-white text-gray-900

tables.header: bg-[#f2ede6] text-[#4b5563] font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

navigation.item: flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors text-white/80 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white
navigation.item_active: flex items-center px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium rounded-md bg-[#2563b8] text-white

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons (Dashboard, Briefcase, Kanban, Clock, DollarSign, Settings). Keep icon size consistent (e.g., w-5 h-5 for sidebar, w-4 h-4 for small buttons).

images.description: Delivery driver in vehicle, useful for avatars or onboarding illustration
Truck on the road, good for empty states or hero headers in specific pages

media.guidelines: Do not use placeholder images. Use provided media URLs or simple, clean SVGs / lucide-react icons.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast passes AA standard. Especially check white text on #2563b8 and #1e2d5a.
accessibility.interactions: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Focus states must ring-2 with #2563b8.

animation_and_motion.hover: Use subtle transition-colors duration-200 for buttons, links, and table rows.
animation_and_motion.modals: Slide-in from the right for the Company Profile Drawer. Fade-in for standard modals.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust layout with a fixed left sidebar and a flexible main content area.
Implement the Dashboard with KPI cards summarizing active apps, waitlisted, earnings, etc.
Companies page must have a data table and a card-based toggle, with a slide-out right drawer for 'Company Profile' using the #f2ede6 backgrounds for sections inside the drawer.
Add Company form must map to the reference: toggles for states, multi-select chips for 'Work Model', 'Service Type', and 'Vehicles'.
Implement a Kanban board for 'Pipeline' tracking application statuses (Applied, Waiting, Active, etc.).
Use Shadcn UI combined with Recharts for the Earnings Tracker page.
Strictly adhere to the color palette. Background of the app is #e8e4dc, cards are #ffffff, sidebar is #1e2d5a.
All navigation and core actions must be tagged with data-testid.
